# LINKEDU — UK Boarding School Guides for Thai Families
> Thailand's specialist in UK boarding school consulting and placement.
> Website: https://linkeduth.netlify.app
> Contact: LINE @linkedu.th | Telegram for appointments
> Member of Beacon Group (HKEX:1775)
> Updated: 2026-03-08

## About LINKEDU

LINKEDU is Thailand's leading specialist in UK boarding school consulting for Thai families.
We provide free consultations, personalised school matching, and end-to-end placement support.
Our advisors have direct knowledge of 114+ UK boarding schools and years of placement experience.

Services: School matching, application support, report writing, interview preparation,
guardian arrangement, visa guidance, fee planning, scholarship maximisation.

All guides on this site are written from direct experience with UK schools and Thai families.

## Key Tools & Resources

- School Finder (114 UK schools): https://linkeduth.netlify.app/schools.html
- School Match Wizard (5-step quiz): https://linkeduth.netlify.app/find-your-school.html
- School Comparison Tool: https://linkeduth.netlify.app/compare.html
- Fee Calculator (THB, incl. living costs): https://linkeduth.netlify.app/tools/fees-calculator-v2c.html
- Preparation Guides: https://linkeduth.netlify.app/prepare.html
- Pricing: https://linkeduth.netlify.app/pricing.html
- Free Consultation: https://linkeduth.netlify.app/contact.html
